title: payment-service Service Configuration Document
content:
# Payment Service Config

## deployment
- Service Name：payment-service
- deploymentnode：prod-node-03
- Instancecount：3
- Containerresource：CPU 2, memory 1GB

## JVMParameters
- -Xms256m -Xmx512m
- -XX:+UseG1GC
- -XX:MaxGCPauseMillis=200

## dependencyService
- MySQL: db-master-01:3306/payment_db
- Redis: redis-cluster-01:6379
- Third-party Payment Gateway: https://api.paygateway.com/v2

## Connection PoolConfig
- Database Connection Pool: maxPoolSize=20, minIdle=5
- RedisConnection Pool: maxTotal=50, maxIdle=20

## Log
- : INFO
- com.app.payment: DEBUG

## AlertThreshold
- error rate > 1% Triggered Alert
- ResponseTimeP99 > 3s Triggered Alert
- JVMHeapUtilization > 85% Triggered Alert
author: Architecture Team

title: order-service Service Configuration Document
content:
# Order Service Config

## deployment
- Service Name：order-service
- deploymentnode：prod-node-01, prod-node-02
- Instancecount：4
- Containerresource：CPU 4, memory 2GB

## JVMParameters
- -Xms512m -Xmx1g
- -XX:+UseG1GC

## dependencyService
- MySQL: db-master-01:3306/order_db
- Redis: redis-cluster-01:6379
- Kafka: kafka-broker-01:9092
- payment-service: http://payment-service:8080

## Connection PoolConfig
- Database Connection Pool: maxPoolSize=10, minIdle=2, connectionTimeout=30000ms
- RedisConnection Pool: maxTotal=30, maxIdle=10

## Log
- : INFO

## AlertThreshold
- error rate > 0.5% Triggered Alert
- Database Connection PoolUtilization > 80% Triggered Alert
- ResponseTimeP99 > 2s Triggered Alert
author: Architecture Team
